Google Vids now features Gemini Omni, which lets you generate and edit high-quality videos using simple text prompts and image references. You can also create a digital avatar to deliver messages for you by uploading a selfie and a voice recording. Check your eligibility for these tools and start experimenting with your next video project today.

Summaries were generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental.

Google Vids just added two new features to help you create better videos faster.
Use Gemini Omni to generate or edit high-quality clips with simple text prompts.
Easily swap backgrounds or fix lighting by just describing what you want to change.
Create a digital avatar to star in videos without needing a camera or recording.
Every AI-generated clip includes a digital watermark to keep your content transparent and honest.

Summaries were generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental.

Google Vids now uses AI to help you make videos just by typing what you want to see. You can even edit your clips by simply describing the changes you need. If you don't want to be on camera, you can create a digital avatar that looks and sounds like you. Every AI-made video gets a special watermark so people know it was generated.

Summaries were generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental.

Explore other styles:

Today, we’re rolling out two new updates to Google Vids to make it easier than ever to create, edit and personalize your videos: Gemini Omni and personal avatars. Gemini Omni takes the hard work out of the editing process, so generating and refining high-quality clips is as easy as writing a simple prompt. And with personal avatars, you have an entirely new way to star in videos without setting up a camera.Here’s a look at how these new tools transform video creation.Generate videos from text and imagesIn the past year, you’ve created millions of videos in Google Vids to share your stories and bring your ideas to life. In February, we made the process simpler by rolling out Veo 3.1 to all users, helping everyone generate videos within Vids.

Now, we’re bringing Gemini Omni to Vids, so you can create and edit high-quality videos just by describing what you want to see. Start with a simple text prompt in natural language, and add image references — like a photo or a rough sketch — for more detail. Omni mixes your inputs to generate a video that matches your vision.Chat to edit, step-by-stepGetting a video exactly right often requires a few tweaks after that first draft — and making those edits is now as easy as describing what you want to see. Whether you're refining a video you generated with Omni or a clip you shot on your phone, you can use everyday language to prompt Vids to swap backgrounds, fix lighting or add effects.

Because Omni supports step-by-step edits, you can now make changes to your videos without starting from scratch.Star in videos, instantlyWant to send a quick video update or personalized shout-out, but don't have time to get camera-ready? With new personal avatars, you can create a digital avatar that looks and sounds like you. Just upload a selfie and a short voice recording. From there, type what you want to say and your avatar will deliver the message — no recording required.

Gemini Omni and personal avatars are available in Google Vids for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers and Google Workspace business customers. Access to personal avatars is currently limited to users in certain regions who are 18 or older. Personal avatars are linked to a user’s Google Account and are restricted to the account holder’s likeness.Create and share with transparencyWe want you to feel confident sharing what you create. To ensure content transparency, every generated clip includes an invisible SynthID digital watermark. This allows people to verify that a video was created with AI, so you can explore your creativity and share your AI videos responsibly.Come see what you can create with Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids.
